allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role',''\) if role == 'user': content = obj.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': txt = c.get\('text',''\).strip\(\) if txt and not txt.startswith\('<'\): print\(f'USER: {txt[:300]}'\) print\('---'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and content.strip\(\) and not content.strip\(\).startswith\('<'\): print\(f'USER: {content.strip\(\)[:300]}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")
